name: Great Shrimp Scampi'
recipeIngredient: 1 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the shrimp with olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and chopped parsley. Add a pinch of chili powder if desired.
2. Marinate for 1 hour at room temperature.
3. Heat an electric wok or large skillet over medium-high heat to 350°F (175°C).
4. Add the marinated shrimp in batches, cooking until they turn pink and opaque, about 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Cook linguine or pasta al dente according to package instructions.
6. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the cooked shrimp.
7. Toss well to coat the pasta with the remaining garlic and parsley sauce.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
